title: cyrtandra longifolia var. degenerans
intro: Cyrtandra longifolia var. degenerans, also known as the Degener's cyrtandra or long-leaved cyrtandra, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra longifolia var. degenerans include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices for topical application, with the plant being a valuable resource in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
